plugins.name: video-bug-analyzer
plugins.description: Diagnose UI and rendering bugs from a screen recording. Give Claude a video and roughly when the bug happens; the plugin extracts frames — an overview contact sheet, scene-cut detection, or per-timestamp zoom with before/after strips — then reasons over them to pinpoint the defect. Strong on persistent visual bugs, honest about flicker, timing, and off-screen state. Requires ffmpeg (auto-installs where the sandbox allows).

plugins.name: repo-bootstrap
plugins.description: Set up a repo to use portka-tools plugins (writes .claude/settings.json + optional CI), and optionally install the Portka standard setup: a workflow CLAUDE.md, a git/gh permissions allowlist, and an enforced SemVer VERSION/CHANGELOG/README sync with a basic test suite.

plugins.name: app-website-evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluate an app or website — SEO, crawlability, AI-readiness, social/sharing assets, security, performance, and growth (communities to join/submit to, PR wins) — tailored to the site's type and community.

plugins.name: tab-chord-formatter
plugins.description: Format a messy guitar tab or chord sheet into a clean, standard, readable layout. Standardizes [Section] labels, aligns chords over the right lyric syllables, tidies a metadata header (Title/Artist/Capo/Key/Tuning) and 6-line ASCII tab blocks — a deterministic script does the cleanup, the skill applies judgment to re-align and infer structure.
